Field index / 2026

Build the capability, not the theatre.

Drag the index. Release to coast. Use arrows for a precise scan.

Capability / formatOutcome
  1. 01 · Advisory2 weeks

    Product narrative intensive

    Turn a scattered feature set into one testable story, page hierarchy, and launch brief.

    Positioning·Prototype brief
  2. 02 · Studio course4 sessions

    Motion systems lab

    Design reusable timing, hierarchy, and state transitions around a working interface.

    Motion tokens·Critique
  3. 03 · Delivery3–5 weeks

    Interface prototype sprint

    Resolve a high-risk flow as a production-shaped prototype with evidence and handoff notes.

    Interaction·User test
  4. 04 · Team workshop1 day

    Design engineering alignment

    Map visual intent to constraints, component contracts, and a shared quality threshold.

    System map·Decisions
  5. 05 · Audit10 days

    Experience quality review

    Find costly inconsistencies across content, interaction, accessibility, and implementation.

    Evidence·Priority plan
  6. 06 · Coaching6 weeks

    Creative lead office hours

    Weekly decision support for teams navigating ambiguity, critique, and launch pressure.

    Review·Leadership
Ready · 01 / 06 Motion · human inertial index A real vertical throw decays into bounded rest; no movement occurs without input.
